hypotheses.title: TST Dissolution Kinetics in the Surface-Reaction-Limited Regime of Low Drug-Loading ASDs
hypotheses.key_strength: Genuinely novel TST application with Damkohler criterion. Exceptional mechanistic specificity with quantitative predictions (Ea, sigma, Da, drug-loading crossover). Hard falsification criterion.
hypotheses.key_weakness: Activation energy Ea = 60-80 kJ/mol misattributed to Gislason & Oelkers 2003 (paper reports 25.5 kJ/mol). Value exists in literature from ab initio studies but wrong source cited.
hypotheses.verdict_reason: Novel and mechanistically exceptional. Ea misattribution is a significant grounding error that must be corrected but does not invalidate the core hypothesis.
citation_issues: Gislason & Oelkers 2003 reports Ea = 25.5 kJ/mol, not 60-80 kJ/mol as claimed

hypotheses.title: Grambow Rate Law 2 Predicts Competitive Passivation-Erosion Kinetics and Regime Switching in ASD Dissolution
hypotheses.key_strength: Maximum cross-field distance (nuclear waste glass to pharmaceuticals). Sophisticated competitive ODE with MW-dependent regime switching. PVP-VA negative control distinguishes passivation from generic Higuchi kinetics.
hypotheses.key_weakness: MW scaling exponent -3.5 is inaccurate (should be -3.4 experimental or -3.0 theoretical). Steady-state layer thickness of 0.1 nm for HPMCAS-M is subnanometer, physically marginal.
hypotheses.verdict_reason: Novel and testable framework with all major citations verified. Minor inaccuracies in MW exponent and marginal layer thickness prediction do not invalidate the three-regime framework.
citation_issues: MW scaling exponent should be ~3.4 (Doi-Edwards experimental), not 3.5

hypotheses.title: Dual Saturation Index Competition Predicts LLPS vs. Crystallization Pathway Switching in Ionizable Drug ASD Dissolution
hypotheses.key_strength: Genuinely novel dual-SI framework distinct from MFAD. Enables LLPS vs crystallization SEQUENCE prediction that MFAD cannot make. Quantitative pH_crit formula and 12-condition falsification matrix.
hypotheses.key_weakness: MFAD citation attributes paper to 'Kasimova et al.' when actual authors are Schall, Capellades & Myerson (CrystEngComm 2019). Wrong author attribution.
hypotheses.verdict_reason: Strong novel framework with high clinical relevance. Author citation error must be corrected but the cited paper exists and the MFAD concept is real.
citation_issues: Kasimova et al. CrystEngComm 2019 should be Schall, Capellades & Myerson

hypotheses.title: Nucleation-Controlled Ostwald Ripening with Polymer Inhibition Predicts ASD Phase Evolution Trajectories
hypotheses.key_strength: Novel competitive nucleation-growth framework with polymer inhibition. Well-grounded core concepts. Three-regime phase evolution prediction.
hypotheses.key_weakness: Key bridge claim (selective polymer non-adsorption to LLPS droplets due to conformational entropy) is unverified. Significant overlap with H1.6-E.
hypotheses.verdict_reason: Novel and mechanistically interesting but the key bridge mechanism lacks experimental verification. Overlap with H1.6-E reduces incremental value.

hypotheses.title: Pressure-Fracture Competition Regime Map for ASD Manufacturing Optimization
hypotheses.key_strength: Novel application of activation volume framework to pharmaceutical manufacturing. Dimensionless Pc number provides systematic regime classification.
hypotheses.key_weakness: Activation volume effect at pharmaceutical pressures is only ~17%, likely overwhelmed by mechanical effects (sintering, fracture). Pharmaceutical literature shows IDR unchanged below 125 MPa.
hypotheses.verdict_reason: Intellectually novel but quantitatively marginal at pharmaceutical pressures. The predicted 'pressure-controlled regime' may not produce measurable effects in practice.

hypotheses.title: Hybrid Buffer-Switch Model for pH-Adaptive ASD Dissolution Control
hypotheses.key_strength: Factually correct characterization of HPMCAS pH-dependent behavior. Autocatalytic dissolution regime is a genuinely novel prediction.
hypotheses.key_weakness: Primarily redescribes well-known HPMCAS pH-dependent dissolution using geochemical terminology. 'Switch mode' IS standard enteric polymer dissolution. Buffer capacity too low to be practically significant.
hypotheses.verdict_reason: INSUFFICIENT NOVELTY. Core mechanism redescribes known pharmaceutical behavior. Genuinely novel predictions (autocatalytic, hysteresis) are small in magnitude. MAGELLAN requires connections that don't yet exist.
